Interface CelExpr

All Known Subinterfaces:
CelExpr.Binary, CelExpr.Macro, CelExpr.Unary
All Known Implementing Classes:
CelExpr.Add, CelExpr.And, CelExpr.BoolValue, CelExpr.BytesValue, CelExpr.Divide, CelExpr.DoubleValue, CelExpr.EqualTo, CelExpr.FunctionCall, CelExpr.GreaterThan, CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo, CelExpr.Ident, CelExpr.IfElse, CelExpr.In, CelExpr.Index, CelExpr.LessThan, CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo, CelExpr.ListOf, CelExpr.LongValue, CelExpr.Macro.All, CelExpr.Macro.Exists, CelExpr.Macro.ExistsOne, CelExpr.Macro.Filter, CelExpr.Macro.FilterMap, CelExpr.Macro.Has, CelExpr.Macro.Map, CelExpr.MapOf, CelExpr.MemberCall, CelExpr.Modulo, CelExpr.Multiply, CelExpr.Negative, CelExpr.Not, CelExpr.NotEqualTo, CelExpr.NullValue, CelExpr.OptionalIndex, CelExpr.OptionalSelect, CelExpr.Or, CelExpr.Select, CelExpr.StringValue, CelExpr.Struct, CelExpr.Subtract, CelExpr.UintValue
public sealed interface CelExpr permits CelExpr.NullValue, CelExpr.BoolValue, CelExpr.LongValue, CelExpr.UintValue, CelExpr.DoubleValue, CelExpr.StringValue, CelExpr.BytesValue, CelExpr.Ident, CelExpr.Select, CelExpr.Index, CelExpr.OptionalSelect, CelExpr.OptionalIndex, CelExpr.Binary, CelExpr.Unary, CelExpr.IfElse, CelExpr.FunctionCall, CelExpr.MemberCall, CelExpr.ListOf, CelExpr.MapOf, CelExpr.Struct, CelExpr.Macro
Abstract representation of a parsed Common Expression Language (CEL) expression.
Since:
10.7

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Add
    Addition: x + y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.And
    Logical AND comparison: x && y.
    static interface 
    CelExpr.Binary
    An expression composed by a binary operator.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.BoolValue
    Boolean literal.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.BytesValue
    Byte sequence literal.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Divide
    Division: x / y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.DoubleValue
    Double-precision floating point literal.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Element
     
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Entry<K>
    An entry/field representing a key-value or field-value mapping in map or struct literals.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.EqualTo
    Equality comparison: x == y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.FunctionCall
    Global function calls f(args).
    static final record 
    CelExpr.GreaterThan
    Greater than relational comparison: x > y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo
    Greater than or equal to relational comparison: x >= y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Ident
    Variable or symbol lookup (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.IfElse
    Ternary conditional (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.In
    Containment comparison: x in y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Index
    Subscript/indexing (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.LessThan
    Less than relational comparison: x < y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo
    Less than or equal to relational comparison: x <= y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.ListOf
    List creation (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.LongValue
    Signed 64-bit integer literal.
    static interface 
    CelExpr.Macro
    Abstract representation of a CEL macro expression.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.MapOf
    Map creation (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.MemberCall
    Member calls target.f(args).
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Modulo
    Modulo/remainder: x % y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Multiply
    Multiplication: x * y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Negative
    Unary sign negation: -x.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Not
    Logical negation: !x.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.NotEqualTo
    Inequality comparison: x != y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.NullValue
    Null literal.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.OptionalIndex
    Optional subscript/indexing (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.OptionalSelect
    Optional field selection (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Or
    Logical OR comparison: x || y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Select
    Field selection (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.StringValue
    UTF-8 string literal.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Struct
    Struct/message creation (e.g.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Subtract
    Subtraction: x - y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.UintValue
    Unsigned 64-bit integer literal.
    static interface 
    CelExpr.Unary
    An expression composed by a unary operator.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default CelExpr.Add
    add(CelExpr that)
    a.add(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a + b").
    default CelExpr.And
    and(CelExpr that)
    a.and(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a && b").
    default CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo
    atLeast(CelExpr floor)
    a.atLeast(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a >= b").
    default CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo
    atMost(CelExpr ceiling)
    a.atMost(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a <= b").
    static CelExpr.BytesValue
    bytes(byte... value)
    CelExpr.bytes((byte) 1, (byte) 2) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("b'\\x01\\x02'").
    default CelExpr.MemberCall
    call(CelExpr.Ident member, List<CelExpr> args)
    target.call(member, args) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("target.member(args)").
    default CelExpr.Divide
    divide(CelExpr that)
    a.divide(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a / b").
    default CelExpr.EqualTo
    equalTo(CelExpr that)
    a.equalTo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a == b").
    default CelExpr.GreaterThan
    greaterThan(CelExpr that)
    a.greaterThan(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a > b").
    default CelExpr.IfElse
    ifElse(CelExpr ifTrue, CelExpr ifFalse)
    active.ifElse(1, 0) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("active ? 1 : 0").
    default CelExpr.In
    in(CelExpr that)
    a.in(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a in b").
    default CelExpr.Index
    index(CelExpr index)
    expr.index(value(0)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr[0]").
    default CelExpr.LessThan
    lessThan(CelExpr that)
    a.lessThan(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a < b").
    default CelExpr.Modulo
    modulo(CelExpr that)
    a.modulo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a % b").
    default CelExpr.Multiply
    multiply(CelExpr that)
    a.multiply(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a * b").
    static CelExpr.Negative
    negative(CelExpr expr)
    CelExpr.negative(value(5)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("-(5)").
    static CelExpr.Not
    not(CelExpr expr)
    CelExpr.not(value(true)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("!true").
    default CelExpr.NotEqualTo
    notEqualTo(CelExpr that)
    a.notEqualTo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a != b").
    static CelExpr
    of(String cel)
    Parses and returns a CelExpr representing the cel string.
    default CelExpr.OptionalIndex
    optionalIndex(CelExpr index)
    expr.optionalIndex(value(0)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr[?0]").
    default CelExpr.OptionalSelect
    optionalSelect(CelExpr.Ident field)
    expr.optionalSelect("field") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr.?field").
    default CelExpr.OptionalSelect
    optionalSelect(String field)
     
    default CelExpr.Or
    or(CelExpr that)
    a.or(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a || b").
    default CelExpr.Select
    select(CelExpr.Ident field)
    expr.select("field") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr.field").
    default CelExpr.Select
    select(String field)
     
    int
    sourceIndex()
    Returns the 0-based source character index where this expression starts.
    static CelExpr.StringValue
    string(String value)
    CelExpr.value("foo") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("'foo'").
    static CelExpr.Struct
    struct(String typeName, Map<String, CelExpr.Element> fields)
    CelExpr.struct("MyMsg", Map.of("field", new Element(value(1), true))) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("MyMsg{?field: 1}").
    default CelExpr.Subtract
    subtract(CelExpr that)
    a.subtract(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a - b").
    static CelExpr.UintValue
    unsigned(long value)
    CelExpr.unsigned(123) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("123u").
    static CelExpr.BoolValue
    value(boolean value)
    CelExpr.value(true) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("true").
    static CelExpr.DoubleValue
    value(double value)
    CelExpr.value(12.3) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("12.3").
    static CelExpr.LongValue
    value(long value)
    CelExpr.value(123) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("123").
    CelExpr
    withSourceIndex(int index)
    Returns a copy of this expression with the given source index.

  • Method Details

    • sourceIndex

      int sourceIndex()
      Returns the 0-based source character index where this expression starts.

    • withSourceIndex

      CelExpr withSourceIndex(int index)
      Returns a copy of this expression with the given source index.

    • of

      static CelExpr of(String cel)
      Parses and returns a CelExpr representing the cel string.

      By default comments are not supported. Use CelParser.withComments() if you need comments.

    • value

      static CelExpr.BoolValue value(boolean value)
      CelExpr.value(true) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("true").

    • value

      static CelExpr.LongValue value(long value)
      CelExpr.value(123) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("123").

    • value

      static CelExpr.DoubleValue value(double value)
      CelExpr.value(12.3) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("12.3").

    • string

      static CelExpr.StringValue string(String value)
      CelExpr.value("foo") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("'foo'").

    • bytes

      static CelExpr.BytesValue bytes(byte... value)
      CelExpr.bytes((byte) 1, (byte) 2) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("b'\\x01\\x02'").

    • unsigned

      static CelExpr.UintValue unsigned(long value)
      CelExpr.unsigned(123) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("123u").

    • struct

      static CelExpr.Struct struct(String typeName, Map<String, CelExpr.Element> fields)
      CelExpr.struct("MyMsg", Map.of("field", new Element(value(1), true))) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("MyMsg{?field: 1}").

    • negative

      static CelExpr.Negative negative(CelExpr expr)
      CelExpr.negative(value(5)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("-(5)").

    • not

      static CelExpr.Not not(CelExpr expr)
      CelExpr.not(value(true)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("!true").

    • select

      default CelExpr.Select select(CelExpr.Ident field)
      expr.select("field") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr.field").

    • select

      default CelExpr.Select select(String field)

    • optionalSelect

      default CelExpr.OptionalSelect optionalSelect(String field)

    • index

      default CelExpr.Index index(CelExpr index)
      expr.index(value(0)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr[0]").

    • optionalSelect

      default CelExpr.OptionalSelect optionalSelect(CelExpr.Ident field)
      expr.optionalSelect("field") is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr.?field").

    • optionalIndex

      default CelExpr.OptionalIndex optionalIndex(CelExpr index)
      expr.optionalIndex(value(0)) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("expr[?0]").

    • add

      default CelExpr.Add add(CelExpr that)
      a.add(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a + b").

    • subtract

      default CelExpr.Subtract subtract(CelExpr that)
      a.subtract(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a - b").

    • multiply

      default CelExpr.Multiply multiply(CelExpr that)
      a.multiply(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a * b").

    • divide

      default CelExpr.Divide divide(CelExpr that)
      a.divide(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a / b").

    • modulo

      default CelExpr.Modulo modulo(CelExpr that)
      a.modulo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a % b").

    • equalTo

      default CelExpr.EqualTo equalTo(CelExpr that)
      a.equalTo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a == b").

    • notEqualTo

      default CelExpr.NotEqualTo notEqualTo(CelExpr that)
      a.notEqualTo(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a != b").

    • lessThan

      default CelExpr.LessThan lessThan(CelExpr that)
      a.lessThan(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a < b").

    • atMost

      default CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo atMost(CelExpr ceiling)
      a.atMost(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a <= b").

    • greaterThan

      default CelExpr.GreaterThan greaterThan(CelExpr that)
      a.greaterThan(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a > b").

    • atLeast

      default CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo atLeast(CelExpr floor)
      a.atLeast(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a >= b").

    • in

      default CelExpr.In in(CelExpr that)
      a.in(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a in b").

    • and

      default CelExpr.And and(CelExpr that)
      a.and(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a && b").

    • or

      default CelExpr.Or or(CelExpr that)
      a.or(b) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("a || b").

    • ifElse

      default CelExpr.IfElse ifElse(CelExpr ifTrue, CelExpr ifFalse)
      active.ifElse(1, 0) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("active ? 1 : 0").

    • call

      default CelExpr.MemberCall call(CelExpr.Ident member, List<CelExpr> args)
      target.call(member, args) is equivalent to CelExpr.of("target.member(args)").
